text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
46 
PRSCRBR_ID_QLFYR_CD 
LABEL: 
Prescriber Identification Number Qualifier Code 
DESCRIPTION: This variable contains information regarding the type of prescriber identification number that was 
submitted on the original PDE data, as reported by the Part D sponsor on the PDE record submitted to 
CMS. 
Historically, this identifier could be an NPI, DEA
